findings.message: Use ADD instruction to retrieve remote resources. Using wget or curl to download remote files prevents Docker from efficiently utilizing build cache. The ADD instruction can directly fetch remote resources and allows Docker to cache based on URL changes. Replace 'RUN wget/curl <URL>' with 'ADD <URL> <destination>' for better build performance and caching.
